---
description: Comet Studio copyright header guidelines. Reference when creating or reviewing source files that support block comments.
applyTo: "src/cs/**/*.{ts,tsx,css,js,jsx}"
---

# Copyright Header

Source files that support block comments must start with the Comet copyright header:

```typescript
/*---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 *  Copyright (c) Comet. All rights reserved.
 *  Licensed under the MIT License. See LICENSE.txt in the project root for license information.
 *--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
```
